title: Add tag --restore/-r flag to tag command
body:
It is now possible to undo tag operations if the names history is able
to restore the latest tag of a image.

> Wow, you're on  today, @saschagrunert :)
> 
> Just a couple of nits. I like the change and kudos for supporting the remote-client as well!
> 
> Regarding name, I prefer calling it `--restore` as it's clearer (to me) that we restore the previous tag. But that's just a minor preference.

I addressed your review comments and renamed the option to `--restore`. I just have to check if the tests are happy.

Agree with Dan, an untag command sounds better than an undo flag.
